ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agency the employee works for */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the position the employee holds */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "employee_status" TEXT /* Current status of the employee (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "social_security_number" TEXT /* Social Security number of the employee */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the employee (e.g., single, married) */,
  "payroll_frequency" TEXT /* Payroll frequency (e.g., weekly, bi-weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the agency */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the agency */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the agency */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the agency */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_title" TEXT /* Title of the position */,
  "position_description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the position */,
  "benefits_package" TEXT /* Benefits package for the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payroll_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payroll transaction */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee the transaction is associated with */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the payroll transaction */,
  "rate_of_pay" TEXT /* Rate of pay for the employee */,
  "amount_paid" TEXT /* Amount paid to the employee in the transaction */,
  "ytd_gross" TEXT /* Year-to-date gross earnings for the employee */,
  "payroll_period" TEXT /* Payroll period (e.g., weekly, bi-weekly, monthly) */,
  "payroll_status" TEXT /* Payroll status (e.g., pending, processed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payroll_transactions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payroll_deductions" (
  "deduction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payroll deduction */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payroll transaction the deduction is associated with */,
  "deduction_type" TEXT /* Type of deduction (e.g., federal tax, state tax, health insurance) */,
  "deduction_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the deduction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the deduction */,
  "deduction_code" TEXT /* Deduction code (e.g., FED_TAX, STA_TAX, INSUR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deduction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payroll_deductions_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES payroll_transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payroll_adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payroll adjustment */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payroll transaction the adjustment is associated with */,
  "adjustment_date" TEXT /* Date the adjustment was made */,
  "adjustment_type" TEXT /* Type of adjustment (e.g., correction, bonus) */,
  "adjustment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the adjustment */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the adjustment */,
  "adjustment_code" TEXT /* Adjustment code (e.g., CORR, BONUS, OTH) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payroll_adjustments_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES payroll_transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payroll_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payroll report */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee the report is associated with */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annual) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Report status (e.g., pending, generated, sent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payroll_reports_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payroll transaction the audit is associated with */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee the audit is associated with */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date the audit was performed */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of audit (e.g., transaction, update, delete) */,
  "audit_description" TEXT /* Description of the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES payroll_transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_requests" (
  "leave_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave request */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who submitted the request */,
  "leave_type" TEXT /* Type of leave (e.g., vacation, sick, holiday) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the leave */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the leave */,
  "leave_status" TEXT /* Leave status (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leave_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_requests_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefits enrollment */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who is enrolled */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., health, dental, vision) */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "coverage_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of coverage */,
  "coverage_end_date" TEXT /* End date of coverage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_enrollments_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
